frame_convention: canonical_library NPZ-compat local frame: +x_local lateral (tangent × UP), +y_local OOP/droop, +z_local along-midrib; donors projected via to_local_frame(tip_canonical_rotate=False) to match the XML surface_cp bake convention

pca_truncation.drop_reason: Midrib-content modes (sqrt(droop^2 + along^2) > 0.3 in eigenvector) had their eigenvalues multiplied by 0.25 (sigma x 0.50) to dampen midrib variance. Eliminates the upright-leaf failure mode (Gaussian draws on droop or along axes producing leaves with reduced lateral spread; observed in canopy5_day180_pca_clamp_scale0.3 seeds 42, 45) while preserving small biological midrib variation. See PLAN_PARAMETRIC_LEAF_SHAPE_2026-05-09_REV1.md section 'Post-alpha: midrib eigenvalue damping'.

e_mf3d_xml_consistency_advisory.note: Advisory: measures real MF3D-vs-XML calibration drift; mean offset is absorbed by np.cov before sampling.

shift_history.reason: JSON +3 shift (NPZ-side: 5 stubs at bottom). MF3D bell peak (rank 6, 78.83 cm) moves from XML slot 6 (z=13 cm, basal) to XML slot 9 (z=91 cm, ear-bearing phytomer). Old ranks 12..14 dropped (MF3D sparse tail, 62/27/-- donors). See DIAG_MAIZE_LEAF_BOTTOM_HEAVY_2026-05-12.

Replace bumpy MF3D-inherited per-rank max_w (which had a secondary peak at slot 11) with a smooth monotonic bell. Target peak max_w = 8 cm at slot 9 brings total rendered area back to ~6900 cm² (donor-reality target).

shift_history.rule: Smooth taper of lmax across slots 0..9 (24 → 78.9 cm) to widen the 4 identical-stub crown left by the +3 rank shift. max_w follows via 0.0989 × lmax + 0.2024; asym_residual channel 0 scaled by max_w_ratio, channels 1+2 by lmax_ratio.
shift_history.reason: Restore donor-reality area target of ~6900 cm² total rendered (was 5769 cm² post-+3-shift). See DIAG_MAIZE_LEAF_BOTTOM_HEAVY_2026-05-12 §'Future tunings (deferred)' option 1, smooth-taper variant (slots 0..9 not 0..3) to preserve monotonicity.
